payload.answer: I can help, but this doesn’t look like durable personal memory. Weather is temporary context, so I won’t treat it as a long-term memory unless you want it saved for a specific reason.
repair_options: Do not save this as memory.
Save it only as a temporary note for today.
Save it as a dated journal/log entry: "Today’s weather is cloudy."
Clarify why this should be remembered long-term.
